rationale: The pitch lifts to C# — I'll warm the background gently and add a second, higher line of moonlight that breathes with the phrase, sitting above the first so the room feels it widening.

input.svg_markup: <svg viewBox="-500 -40 1000 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="ml2" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="0.3" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0.92"/><stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="-380" y1="0" x2="380" y2="0" stroke="url(#ml2)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="200" y2="0" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.7" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
